**Project**
Which core / domain does this relate to?

**Describe the feature**
What would you like to add?

**Motivation**
Why is this valuable? Which phase does it support (2-RTL, 3-Synthesis, 4-P&R, 5-Signoff)?

**Implementation sketch (optional)**
Any ideas on how to implement this?
